scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @knowledge-platform/api" "npm run dev -w @knowledge-platform/web"
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; if (Test-Path 'apps/web/.next') { Remove-Item 'apps/web/.next' -Recurse -Force }" && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w @knowledge-platform/api && npm run build -w @knowledge-platform/web
scripts.verify: npm run build -w @knowledge-platform/api && npm run build -w @knowledge-platform/web
